name: Buttermilk Spice Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1/2 stick unsalted butter or margarine (not spread), melted and cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Spray 12 regular-size muffin cups with nonstick cooking spray or place 12 foil cupcake liners on a cookie sheet.
3. In a 2-3 quart bowl, stir together flour, baking powder, baking soda, spices, and salt until blended.
4. Pour in buttermilk, eggs, sugar, melted butter or margarine, and vanilla extract; stir just until mixed.
5. Spoon the batter into muffin cups or liners, then sprinkle with 1 tablespoon sugar.
6. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until tops are lightly browned and muffins springy to the touch.
7. Allow cooling in the pan for 5 minutes before transferring to a wire rack.
8. Serve warm or at room temperature.
